title: stellaria fennica
intro: Stellaria fennica, also known as Snowy Meadowcress or White Chickweed, is a perennial herb native to the Arctic tundra in Northern Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, salves, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
